creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've been hit by the same issue after upgrading from 13.2 to 13.3 (unfortunately I don't remember if I was on the latest patch version on 13.2, though).

When I try to build 'node-sass' now I get an error because an included file (__string/constexpr_c_functions.h) is missing. But "freebsd-update IDS" doesn't report any inconsistency, is it correct? I'd expect to report at least the 3 missing files in the '__string' directory, but perhaps it reports mismatches only on existing files?

What's the best/easiest way to fix it now?
